notes: PRs #1426,#1439,#1456,#1457 MERGED. PRs #1429,#1438 CLOSED. #1406 CLOSED. Monthly #1403 closed, April 2026 monthly #1433 active. PR #1431=CMI p-value fix. PR #1432=Delta method CI (closes #336). PR #1435=EconML categorical EM fix. PR #1454=fix NaN p-value when std=0. PR #1455=fix KeyError conditional_MI. PR #1460=fix categorical groupby KeyError + FutureWarning in dummy_outcome_refuter (closes #1316). PR #1461=fix estimate_effect_naive list-form treatment_variable (closes #416). PR #1462=fix TwoStageRegression preinstantiated second_stage_model (closes #1335). PR #1463=remove deprecated copy=False from pandas astype(). PR #1464=feat auto-select default method_name in estimate_effect (closes #365). PR #1465=fix exact_match_cols bugs in DistanceMatchingEstimator + 12 new tests (closes #814). #1444 can be closed (absorbed into #1432). #1443 is ISSUE (CI workflow file protected). Commented #814 (3 bugs in exact_match_cols, fix PR submitted).

fix_attempts.description: Fix 3 bugs in DistanceMatchingEstimator.estimate_effect with exact_match_cols; add 12 tests
Auto-select default estimation method when method_name=None
